element_introduction_order.first_appears: Tower of Ancients - early castle area
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Gizmo enemies serve as tutorial opponents
Headquarters in towns allow equipment and unit inspection
Specific story events unlock character availability
Dual promotion paths for certain characters; special items unlock hidden classes
No chapter gates; player can revisit any location, discover hidden treasures
Ongoing throughout; interactable objects reward exploration

element_introduction_order.first_appears: King Granseal possessed by Gizmo leader
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Enemy commander possession establishes story stakes; mechanic carries through to King Galam

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Ancient Tower - possessed King Galam battle
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Environmental collapse after boss defeat; hostage mechanic complicates victory
Non-action turn commands (equip/drop) allow mid-battle optimization

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Narrative-driven with alternating exploration and combat phases; story events trigger combat escalation and map expansion; tension builds through possession/corruption mechanics then releases via story-gate advancement

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden treasures and invisible items reward exploration; optional character recruits require specific events/locations; special promotion items hidden in world
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Specific items unlock alternate class promotion paths; conditional recruits require narrative progression milestones

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction via Gizmo tutorial battles in Tower of Ancients; basic mechanics taught through low-threat grid combat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalates through multi-location dungeons (Galam prison), possession mechanics introduce status complexity, military invasion raises stakes
difficulty_curve.late_game: World-spanning quest across Parmecia continent; multi-part boss encounters; hidden item/character discovery becomes key to optimal builds
notable_spikes: Tower of Ancients leader Gizmo possession event
King Galam possession battle with environmental collapse
Forced continental relocation shifts scope and enemy density

notable_level_patterns.description: Tower of Ancients opening: narrow dungeon with escalating Gizmo encounters teaching grid-based movement and basic attack/spell sequencing before story gate opens
Safe town hub (equipment, recruitment, dialogue) → dungeon exploration (mixed combat/treasure) → story boss encounter with narrative consequence and world-state change
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Granseal Castle → Tower → Galam Kingdom sequence

notable_level_patterns.description: Post-collapse Parmecia: open world with no chapter gates, allowing player-directed questline completion; towns serve as persistent hubs; backtracking essential for hidden recruits and items
Boss encounters trigger world-altering events (possession → illness → collapse); spatial transitions correspond to narrative shifts; relocation forces new map learn
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Ancient Tower collapse after King Galam defeat
